form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 1.4 lengths fourth (22.45) over 390m at Ballarat. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.29) when fourth over 300m at Healesville in a Grade 5. Starts from box 2 for the first time here. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (17.29) when fourth over 300m at Healesville in a Grade 5. Starts from box 2 for the first time here. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Faltered on first turn and tailed off.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running last time with a hot early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 9 lengths (23.99) at Sale. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running last time with a hot early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 9 lengths (23.99) at Sale. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Finished second at big odds last time (22.23) over 390m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th on March 27 over 425m at Bendigo behind Reckless beaten 5.5 lengths (24.39) in a Grade 5. Has the ability to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.39) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten 0.8 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Others appear better placed.

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fifth (22.46) at this track over 390m. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 3.5 lengths third at Bendigo but did record a slick 23.99 over the 425m journey. Rates on top here on the time from last run.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at his last couple of starts, most recently at Bendigo over 425m. Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 390m at this track. Not up to this.
